injection_recovery.reliability_definition: recovered injections / all SDE>=threshold detections (recovered + wrong-period + null-trial false alarms)

scope_notes: Injection budget: 24 injections + 4 null trials per host (hundreds total, not thousands; single-session compute budget).
Search runs on 10-min binned flux; depths near the per-bin noise floor at the shortest periods are the hardest cells.

Null trials use 1-day block shuffles of the flux: intra-day noise structure preserved, longer coherent signals destroyed. Known-planet transits AND secondary-eclipse windows are masked before injection/null trials.
